my-resume.text:
Greetings, I am Mario Larsen
Welcome to my online blog
Would you like to gain deeper insights into my journey ?

coming-soon.title: Upcoming Content

This website is under renovation
Come back soon to see more

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.text:
I have done lots of projects
I will try to list them all here
Careful, I'm not proud of all of them

resume.summary:
Greetings, I am Mario Larsen
Welcome to my online blog
Would you like to gain deeper insights into my journey ?
resume.subTitle:
R&D Engineer specialized in Full-Stack Development, Data Analysis and AI implementation
Looking for new challenging problems within an ethical and inquisitive team

ensea.name: ENSEA, École Nationale Supérieure de l'Électronique et de ses Applications
ensea.text:
Prestigious institution specializing in electrical engineering, computer science, and communication networks.
Led multiple ambitious projects, including a Reinforcement Learning Solver and a Relation Network Video Classifier.
**Graduated with honours, majoring in Signal Processing and Artificial Intelligence**

civ.name: CIV, Centre International de Valbonne
civ.text: Intensive preparatory program dedicated to competitive exams at top-tier French engineering schools (Grandes Écoles).

parc.name: Parc Impérial
parc.text: Baccalaureate with honours, specializing in sciences with advanced mathematics.

intersec.name: INTERSEC
intersec.text:
**Advanced R&D Engineer**
Spearheaded front-end development of critical, globally deployed location-based public warning systems.
Utilized specialized proprietary frameworks bridging React and Vue.js to meet strict national security and low-latency requirements.
Integrated custom AI agents into the geolocated alert pipeline, streamlining emergency secure context operations.

galadrim.name: GALADRIM
galadrim.text:
**Full-Stack Web and Mobile Developer**
Developed and deployed 7 sophisticated web and mobile applications, showcasing versatility and proficiency.

cea.name: CEA-LIST / DIASI: AI Laboratory
cea.text:
Led the unification of detection and re-identification within an innovative deep network architecture for multifaceted tracking.
Championed a groundbreaking visual transformer algorithm, surpassing baseline models in performance.

ljubljana.name: University of Ljubljana
ljubljana.text:
Conducted an independent, comprehensive study and implementation of Virtual Try-On Networks.
Generated a detailed technical report addressing CP-VTON failures, dataset analyses, and possible updates.

resume.interestText:
I publish on links between AI and collective intelligence as an **independent researcher**
I am passionate about social choice, filmmaking, neurology, mathematics, associations and my new Linux Home Lab

portfolio.summary:
I have done lots of projects before this blog and I will try to list them all here.

At some point, some may received there own page

Until then, be careful, I'm not proud of all of them

mslab.title: MS4's Needle Depth Servo-Control
mslab.text:
During my first professional experience, an internship, I gained profound insights into a company's operations.
Immersed in the role of an R&D engineer, I undertook a project to design, construct, and test a control board for adjusting the sampling needle depth in their MS4 blood analyzer.
Over a span of 5 weeks, I autonomously produced a functional analysis report, an Eagle board, a Spice simulation, a functional prototype, and a comprehensive test report.

themis.title: Themis Analog Synthesizer Board
themis.text:
Themis, a collaborative project, engaged a team of around twenty ENSEA students across different engineering years.
Our objective was to design a complete electronic musical instrument with features of a synthesizer and a drum machine.
My focus during a semester was on the main board design for the synthesizer.
The culmination was the delivery of 3 meticulously crafted PCB designs that synthesized the contributions of numerous team members.
The final designs were assembled and rigorously tested even amid the challenges of a pandemic.

virtualTryOn.title: Exploration of Virtual Try-On Networks
virtualTryOn.text:
Embedded in the AI-focused research environment of the University of Ljubljana, I delved into the realm of artificial intelligence applied to visual processing.
My internship concentrated on the study, reimplementation, and analysis of Virtual Try-On Networks.
I researched their shortcomings, devised quality assessment measures, explored datasets, and implemented over 30 approaches using both Python and MATLAB, thus contributing significantly to the ongoing research.

pacman.title: AI-Driven Pac-Man
pacman.text:
As part of my pursuit of AI expertise, I developed 12 iterations of a Python-based Pac-Man environment.
These iterations catered to human players and facilitated OpenAI training.
To gain a profound understanding of reinforcement learning, I reengineered the entire codebase using TensorFlow.
Through environment rendering, I observed successful learning outcomes, as the AI adeptly avoided obstacles and ghosts, albeit with certain limitations.

sorting.title: Interactive Recycling Assistant
sorting.text:
A collaborative effort among a team of four yielded a prototype that revolutionizes recycling by making it engaging and user-friendly.
Our innovation comprises a camera equipped with a deep learning algorithm, capable of identifying the type and material of waste.
Clear disposal instructions are then presented.
An Arduino unit orchestrates the opening of relevant bins.
Our fully functional prototype earned us recognition and accolades from the judging panel.

cloudModel.title: Cloud Formation Simulation
cloudModel.text:
A pivotal project during my preparatory school tenure involved exploring the intricacies of cloud formation.
Through a Python program, I introduced a novel perspective on the evolution of macro water particles as they traverse from the sea to the stratosphere.
This effort earned me a commendable score in national exams.

tyo.title: Team Management and Festival Leadership
tyo.text:
Since its inception in 1991, TYO has annually orchestrated a two-day short film extravaganza.
Operating as an ENSEA student association, each year brought fresh faces to the team.
In 2019, I undertook diverse responsibilities, including poster design using Photoshop, management, organization, and communication coordination.
Additionally, I curated monthly film screenings under the TYO banner at the school.

attenuator.title: LM1971 M Audio Attenuator
attenuator.text:
A brief yet insightful endeavor, this project involved a pair of students collaborating over half a semester.
Our mission centered around fundamental sound manipulations, amplification and attenuation.
Using the LM1971 M chip, we developed a system divided into phases: computer-controlled chip manipulation via Arduino, PCB communication setup, DIY fabrication encompassing ordering, printing, drilling, and welding, and finally, rigorous testing accompanied by iterative enhancements.

snake.title: Multiplayer Snake Game
snake.text:
Enjoy a multiplayer rendition of the classic Snake game, allowing online play with a friend.
Developed based on the HungryTurtleCode project.

sudoku.title: Sudoku Puzzle Solver
sudoku.text: My inaugural leisure project, the Sudoku Solver, paved the way for subsequent endeavors centered around solving this engaging puzzle game.

solitaire.title: Solitaire Winning Probability Evaluator
solitaire.text: To ascertain the winnability of randomly generated Solitaire games, I engineered a program to calculate winning probabilities, thereby facilitating strategic insights.

nonogram.title: Nonogram Enigma Resolver
nonogram.text: Dedicated to decoding Nonogram puzzles, this project aims to unravel their patterns and construct new challenges.

mastermind.title: MasterMind Strategy Solver
mastermind.text: Delving into the realm of code-breaking, this initiative centers on devising optimal strategies for the game of MasterMind.

coinflip.title: Coin Flip Cheaters Bot
coinflip.text:
Presenting a Coin Flip Cheaters bot designed to secure victories in the Primer game competition.
My independent creation briefly claimed the top spot, thanks to its prowess in the game.

wikimpostor.title: Wikimpostor Gaming App
wikimpostor.text: Introducing the Wikimpostor app, bringing the 'Two of these people are lying' game from The Technical Difficulties channel to the realm of Android gaming.

tetris.title: Enhanced Tetris Experience
tetris.text: Elevate your Tetris gameplay with the enhanced MODE feature, providing the option to customize your gaming experience.

minecraft.title: Minecraft with Rhombic Dodecahedra
minecraft.text: Embark on a novel iteration of Minecraft, where the traditional cubes are replaced with intriguing rhombic dodecahedra.

findwater.title: Find Water - The Geo Quiz
findwater.text:
Engage in a 3D quiz game app, primed for enhancing your geographical knowledge.
While currently focused on identifying bodies of water, the app's evolution is promising.

zeta.title: Visualizing Zeta Riemann Function
zeta.text: Experience the beauty of the Riemann Zeta function through dynamic visualizations generated by this home project.

youtubesubs.title: Youtube Subs Mosaic Generator
youtubesubs.text: Unleash the creative potential of your YouTube subscriptions by generating captivating mosaic images using this utility.

chesslab.title: ChessLab Engine Testing Framework
chesslab.text: A modular, open-source chess engine testing and evaluation framework with PostgreSQL storage, parallel game execution, and comprehensive statistical analysis tools.

psyco-quizz.title: PsycoQuizz Assessment Platform
psyco-quizz.text: A web application for completing psychological assessment questionnaires in a digital format.

psl-institute.title: PSL Institute Publications Platform
psl-institute.text: A modern, open-source platform for publishing academic research papers and scientific reflections.

tap-loop-game.title: Tap Loop Puzzle Game
tap-loop-game.text: A grid-based path-drawing puzzle game where you must create loops that pass through every block.

the-sun-never-set.title: The Sun Never Set
the-sun-never-set.text: An interactive map that visualizes historical territories and their relationship to the sun, with real-time day/night visualization.

historical-basemaps-cleaned.title: Historical Basemaps Cleaned
historical-basemaps-cleaned.text: A cleaning, correction, and normalization pipeline for historical basemaps GeoJSON data.

uninteresting.title: Gallery of Uninteresting Numbers
uninteresting.text: A playful exploration of the 'Interesting Number Paradox', documenting numbers that have somehow managed to escape human curiosity.

truel.title: Truel Strategy Simulator
truel.text: A Python strategy simulator for a shootout scenario between three individuals, calculating optimal strategies and generating probability plots.
